name: Univar Solutions Inc.
description: Univar Solutions Inc. is a leading global chemical and ingredient distributor and provider of value-added services. Headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, the company connects a vast network of world-class suppliers with customers across a diverse range of industries. By leveraging its extensive supply chain, technical expertise, and market intelligence, Univar Solutions helps businesses formulate better, more sustainable products. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of specialty and commodity chemicals, providing essential solutions that drive innovation and operational efficiency for manufacturers worldwide.
